name: Steve Cropper
description: American guitarist, songwriter, and record producer
abstract: Stephen Lee Cropper (October 21, 1941 – December 3, 2025), sometimes known as "The Colonel", was an American guitarist, songwriter and record producer. He was the guitarist of the Stax Records house band, Booker T.

concerts.label: Rainforest Foundation Benefit Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: David Torkanowsky
about_quotes.evidence: Interviewee discusses Steve Cropper's solo on a record he loves, but does not mention meeting or working with him.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Torkanowsky interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, September 26, 2019

about_quotes.speaker: Lew Soloff
about_quotes.evidence: There were two guitarists, there was Steve Cropper and Nile Rogers... It was an astounding rhythm section.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lew Soloff interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 16, 2000
